nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Morotai friarbird
nodes.summary: Morotai friarbird（Morotai friarbird，学名 Philemon fuscicapillus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests and tropical moist shrubland

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is probably threatened by habitat loss, as much of the remaining forest in its range is threatened with logging, but more research is needed

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is probably threatened by habitat loss, as much of the remaining forest in its range is threatened with logging, but more research is needed
